system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_sanpham_nhamay_duplicate","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_SANPHAM_NHAMAY_DUPLICATE]
(
	@masp_nhamay nvarchar(50),
	@nguoitao nvarchar(50),
	@ngaytao datetime
)
AS
BEGIN
	
	DECLARE @phienban int;
	DECLARE @magoc nvarchar(50);
	SELECT @magoc = masp_goc FROM tr_sanpham_nhamay
	WHERE masp_nhamay = @masp_nhamay

	SELECT @phienban = COUNT(masp_goc) 
	FROM tr_sanpham_nhamay
	WHERE masp_goc = @magoc

	IF @phienban = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @phienban = @phienban + 1
	END

	DECLARE @newCode nvarchar(50);
	WHILE 1 = 1
	BEGIN
		SET @newCode = CONCAT(@magoc, '-R', @phienban);
		IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tr_sanpham_nhamay WHERE masp_nhamay = @newCode)
		BEGIN
			SET @phienban = @phienban + 1
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			BREAK;
		END
	END

	-- COPY CÁC MÃ NHÀ MÁY
	INSERT INTO tr_sanpham_nhamay(masp_nhamay, tensp, hehang, phienban, masp_goc, nguoitao, ngaytao, active)
	SELECT @newCode AS masp_nhamay,
		tensp = CONCAT(tensp, ' (', 'R', @phienban, ')'),
		hehang, @phienban, masp_goc,
		@nguoitao, @ngaytao, active
	FROM tr_sanpham_nhamay
	WHERE masp_nhamay = @magoc

	-- COPY CÁC MÃ SẢN PHẨM CÓ CÙNG MÃ NHÀ MÁY GỐC
	INSERT INTO tr_sanpham
	(
		masp, masp_khachhang, masp_nhamay, tensp, tensp_vn,
		hehang, mausac, mauuv, loaisp, ketcau, bemat_sanpham,
		dai, rong, cao, kichthuoc, quycach, nguyenlieu, dvt,
		cbm, quycach_carton, carton_qty, customer,
		heso_mam, dongia_mam, n_weight, g_weight, 
		active, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date
	)
	SELECT masp = CONCAT(@newCode, '_', mausac, '_', customer),
		masp_khachhang, 
		masp_nhamay = @newCode, 
		tensp = CONCAT(tensp, ' (', 'R', @phienban, ')'), 
		tensp_vn = CONCAT(tensp_vn, ' (', 'R', @phienban, ')'), 
		hehang,
		mausac, mauuv, loaisp, ketcau, bemat_sanpham,
		dai, rong, cao, kichthuoc, quycach, nguyenlieu, dvt,
		cbm, quycach_carton, carton_qty, customer,
		heso_mam, dongia_mam, n_weight, g_weight, 
		active, @nguoitao, @ngaytao, @nguoitao, @ngaytao
	FROM tr_sanpham
	WHERE masp_nhamay = @magoc
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_sanpham_nhamay"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_sanpham_nhamay"],"flags":["has-while","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
